_publications._publicationTitle: Long Noncoding RNA WT1-AS Inhibit Cell Malignancy via miR-494-3p in Glioma.

_contextSnippet: The proportion of viable cells transfected with WT1-AS was significantly lower in both U87 and U118 cells than in control cells
details: Proportion of viable cells transfected with WT1-AS was significantly lower when treated with TMZ (0-400 μM) and IC50 value was significantly reduced
